plugins.name: sstack
plugins.description: SStack development framework — BDD/TDD + context management + specialized roles in 8-phase pipeline

plugins.name: sstack-dev
plugins.description: SStack Phase 1: Developer Lead — analyzes task, refines into goal + acceptance criteria

plugins.name: sstack-research
plugins.description: SStack Phase 2: Analyst — local + domain research

plugins.name: sstack-arch
plugins.description: SStack Phase 3: Architect — system design + module plan

plugins.name: sstack-spec
plugins.description: SStack Phase 4: QA Lead — BDD specs before code (test-first)

plugins.name: sstack-implement
plugins.description: SStack Phase 5: Engineer — TDD implementation, make specs pass

plugins.name: sstack-refactor
plugins.description: SStack Phase 6: Tech Lead — deduplication, quality, file splitting

plugins.name: sstack-verify
plugins.description: SStack Phase 7: QA — full validation, coverage, production readiness

plugins.name: sstack-ship
plugins.description: SStack Phase 8: Release Manager — VCS sync, docs, completion report

plugins.name: sstack-lang
plugins.description: SStack multi-language support with LSP integration

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Streamlined 5-phase dev workflow — research, plan, implement, verify, sync

plugins.name: repo-and-pull-req
plugins.description: GitHub and Jira/Confluence integration — setup, push, wiki, and autonomous PR review
